summary: Completed comprehensive testing of TG Xchange Admin Panel. All features working correctly: Admin Login, Dashboard Stats, Deposit Requests Management, Users Management, and full deposit approval flow.
passed_tests: Admin Login with valid credentials (admin@tgxchange.com / Admin@TG2024)
Admin Login rejects invalid email
Admin Login rejects invalid password
Admin Dashboard shows stats (Total Users, Total Deposits, Pending Approvals, Today Signups)
Admin Dashboard shows pending deposit requests with Approve/Reject buttons
Admin /api/admin/stats endpoint returns correct data
Admin /api/admin/me endpoint returns admin profile
Admin /api/admin/users endpoint returns all users with wallet balances
Admin /api/admin/deposit-requests endpoint returns all deposit requests with stats
Admin /api/admin/deposit-requests?status=pending filter works
Admin /api/admin/deposit-requests?status=approved filter works
Admin /api/admin/deposit-requests/action approve works - credits user wallet
Admin /api/admin/deposit-requests/action reject works
User can submit deposit request from /deposit page
User /api/user/deposit-request endpoint creates pending request
User /api/user/deposit-requests endpoint returns user's requests
User's wallet balance updates after admin approval
All admin pages have proper navigation (back buttons, links)
All admin pages have refresh functionality
Deposit requests table shows Request ID, User, Amount, Network, TX Hash, Date, Status, Actions
Users table shows User, Email, User ID, USDT Balance, Referral Code, Joined date
seed_data_creation: Admin user auto-created on server startup via ensure_admin_exists()
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin Panel fully tested and working. Admin credentials stored in backend/.env (ADMIN_EMAIL, ADMIN_PASSWORD). Admin user is auto-created on server startup. Full deposit flow tested: User submits deposit request -> Admin sees pending -> Admin approves -> User balance updates. All data-testid attributes present for form elements.
